feedItems.description: allocated £6.5m to Environment & Streets (≈£62 per resident)
allocated £3.6m to Planning & Development (≈£34 per resident)
allocated £3.9m to Council Running Costs (≈£37 per resident)
allocated £1.1m to Culture & Leisure (≈£10 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £113 (5.1%) to £2325
